children.text: consulted with the appropriate Regional Fishery Management Councils; and
received the consent of the Commissioners for that action.

children.heading: Requests and terms of reference described
children.label: b Requests and terms of reference described

children.text: any request, under Article VII(10)(b) of the Convention, that the Scientific Council consider and report on a question pertaining to the scientific basis for the management and conservation of fishery resources in waters under the jurisdiction of the United States within the Convention Area; and

any specification, under Article VII(11) of the Convention, of the terms of reference for the consideration of a question referred to the Scientific Council pursuant to Article VII(10)(b) of the Convention.
